title: armeria berlengensis
intro: Armeria berlengensis, also known as the Berlengas Sea Thrift or Berlenga Thrift, is a plant species belonging to the Primulaceae family, native to the Berlenga Islands in Portugal. Traditionally, Armeria berlengensis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Armeria berlengensis is often prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and can be used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
